organic.title: Freshworks Reviews on AmbitionBox — 4.0 / 5
organic.snippet: Freshworks rated 4.0/5 by 2,341 employees (work-life 4.1, salary 3.7, culture 4.0). Engineering: 4.2/5 across 1,180 reviews. Most cited strengths: peer quality, learning, product impact.

organic.title: Freshworks on Glassdoor — Engineering & Culture
organic.snippet: Freshworks Glassdoor: 3.9/5 overall (1,200+ reviews). Recommended to friend: 78%. CEO approval: 82%. Pros: smart engineers, good engineering practices, US-listed. Cons: process overhead post-IPO.
